raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The Santa Clarita Chamber of Commerce supports legislation aimed at tackling issues like housing, homelessness, support for low income families, water protection, and electric vehicle infrastructure.",
    "AB 823 aims to create electric charging roads and parking lots.",
    "Legislation supported by the Santa Clarita Chamber of Commerce includes measures to streamline affordable housing development funding.",
    "Assemblywoman Pilar Schiavo has a background as a Nurse Advocate and Small Business Owner.",
    "Assemblywoman Pilar Schiavo has helped deliver healthcare, including reproductive healthcare, to more than one million people.",
    "An organization co-founded by Assemblywoman Schiavo helped secure housing for Veterans experiencing homelessness."
```
